title: AI Fundamentals
subtitle: Understand concepts, think critically
description: The core building blocks of modern AI, compact and without prior knowledge. By the end, you understand how language models work internally and can evaluate new AI systems with a critical eye.
goal: Understand how modern language models work at a fundamental level, and evaluate AI systems in everyday life with a critical eye.
behavioralAnchorTemplate: When I encounter a new AI application, I apply the concepts from this learning path to evaluate it critically.

steps.title: Transformers and Attention
steps.reflection: What was the most surprising insight for you in this course?
steps.adaptiveHint: Take another look at Lesson 3 on the Query/Key/Value logic. That is the core everything else builds on, and it is worth staying with.

steps.title: Mid-path reflection
steps.prompt: Explain in your own words: why do tokens need to "talk to each other" before a language model generates a response?
steps.hint: Think about the book library analogy and the concept of context from Lesson 2.

steps.title: Making sense of AI in everyday life
